name: mintbot-monorepo
description: Production-grade NFT mint bot and tracker monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mintbot/shared && npm run build -w @mintbot/blockchain && npm run build -w @mintbot/bot && npm run build -w @mintbot/backend && npm run build -w @mintbot/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mintbot/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mintbot/shared && npm run build -w @mintbot/blockchain && npm run typecheck -w @mintbot/blockchain && npm run build -w @mintbot/bot && npm run typecheck -w @mintbot/bot && npm run typecheck -w @mintbot/backend && npm run typecheck -w @mintbot/frontend
